ABOUT.DESCRIPTION:
👋 Hello! 
From a technical perspective, I am a full-stack developer with a specialization in UX design, and a strong focus on front-end development.
In simple terms: I am a developer specialized in creating and improving websites or applications, with expertise in user experience (UX) design. 🚀

QUESTIONS.existing: Do you have an existing solution (site or application)?
QUESTIONS.improvement: Do you want to improve the design or usability of your solution?
QUESTIONS.speed: Are you looking for a very fast service?
QUESTIONS.selling: Are you planning to sell products/services online?
QUESTIONS.hobbyPresentation: Would you like to share your passion/art/interest?
QUESTIONS.offersPresentation: Would you like to present your offers/services?
QUESTIONS.desktop: Will you be using it on your computer?
QUESTIONS.mobile: Will you be using it on your cell phone?

audit.TITLE: Audit UX
audit.CONTENT:
It seems that you want to optimize the user experience of your current site.
The UX audit is the right offer for you, offering a good compromise between speed and efficiency. We analyze user paths, navigation and structure to detect friction points. You'll receive concrete recommendations for making your interface more intuitive and efficient.

An ideal solution for boosting user engagement and achieving your objectives.

crossApp.TITLE: Cross-platform application
crossApp.CONTENT:
Are you looking for a high-performance solution that can be used on multiple platforms?
The multiplatform application is perfect for your needs. Develop an application that works on mobile and desktop, with a fluid experience on all supports.

It's the ideal solution for reaching a varied audience and satisfying multiple uses, while optimizing your development resources.

desktopApp.TITLE: Desktop application
desktopApp.CONTENT:
Your project seems to require an application specifically designed for computer use.
The desktop application is the perfect solution for your professional needs. With robust functionality and optimized navigation, it meets the requirements of users in a dedicated environment.

e-commerce.TITLE: E-commerce websites
e-commerce.CONTENT:
It seems that your aim is to sell your products or services online in a simple and secure way.
An e-commerce site is the ideal solution for you. With attractive design, intuitive functionality and secure payment, you'll be able to offer your customers a seamless shopping experience 24 hours a day, all while boosting your sales.

mobileApp.TITLE: Mobile application
mobileApp.CONTENT:
Do you want to meet users' needs wherever they are?
A bespoke mobile app is the perfect option. Designed to offer intuitive navigation and functionality tailored to mobile use, it will boost engagement and enable direct interaction with your audience.

mystery.TITLE: Mystery
mystery.CONTENT:
Your project seems unique and requires a fully customized solution.
Contact us for a tailor-made approach guaranteed to meet your needs. Together, we'll define the functionality and design that will make your project as effective as it is unique.

showcase.TITLE: Showcase websites
showcase.CONTENT:
A showcase site is the perfect way to present your company and increase its online visibility. It lets you showcase your services, products or values in a professional way, without direct sales.
Accessible 24 hours a day, it becomes your digital business card, making it easy to get in touch and find out more about your business. A real ally in strengthening your presence and attracting new customers.

tests.TITLE: User tests
tests.CONTENT:
You want to be sure that your solution perfectly matches your users' expectations?
User testing is the ideal answer. It may take longer than a UX audit, but it allows us to go further in the optimization process. By involving people from your target audience, we identify sticking points and optimize the user experience. A key step in guaranteeing satisfaction and loyalty.

KEY_NUMBER_LIST: Experiences online start with a search engine, hence the importance of SEO
Users prefer visiting a company’s website rather than its social media
Consumers conduct online research before making a purchase
Users are willing to pay more for a better user experience
Conversion rates improve with good user experience
For every dollar invested in UX, it returns between 2 and 100 dollars
Users abandon their shopping carts due to poor user experience
Consumers judge a company's credibility based on the quality of its website
Consumers read online reviews before buying a product
Consumers do not trust a company without a website

INTRO.QUESTION: Why is UX essential for your website?
INTRO.RESPONSE:
BOLD/UX/BOLD plays a key role in BOLD/conversion/BOLD and BOLD/user retention/BOLD. A well-designed site improves BOLD/navigation/BOLD, reduces the BOLD/bounce rate/BOLD, and increases the chances that your visitors will take the desired action (BOLD/purchase/BOLD, BOLD/contact/BOLD, BOLD/registration/BOLD, etc.). By investing in an optimal BOLD/user experience/BOLD, you guarantee your users a smooth and enjoyable experience, while maximizing the BOLD/efficiency/BOLD of your site (BOLD/other specific UX services/BOLD can be provided upon request).

Choose a BOLD/quality user experience/BOLD for your visitors and turn every BOLD/interaction/BOLD into an BOLD/opportunity/BOLD!

LIST.TITLE: UX Audit (User Experience Audit)
LIST.CONTENT:
We conduct a BOLD/comprehensive and in-depth audit/BOLD of your existing website to BOLD/identify friction points/BOLD that may harm the BOLD/user experience/BOLD and hinder your BOLD/strategic objectives/BOLD. Our analysis covers key aspects such as BOLD/navigation structure/BOLD, BOLD/clarity and information hierarchy/BOLD, and BOLD/smooth user journeys/BOLD to enhance engagement. We also assess BOLD/accessibility/BOLD, ensuring that your website is BOLD/inclusive and meets industry standards/BOLD, while testing its BOLD/responsiveness/BOLD across different devices (BOLD/desktop, mobile, tablet/BOLD).

At the end of this audit, we provide you with a BOLD/detailed and customized report/BOLD, including a BOLD/summary of identified issues/BOLD and BOLD/actionable recommendations/BOLD, prioritized based on their impact. The goal is to BOLD/improve usability/BOLD, BOLD/efficiency/BOLD, and BOLD/user satisfaction/BOLD on your site.

LIST.TITLE: Wireframes, Mockups, and Interactive Prototyping
LIST.CONTENT:
We design custom BOLD/visual mockups/BOLD and BOLD/wireframes/BOLD (functional mockups) to bring your project to life.

These prototypes provide a concrete view of the BOLD/interaction/BOLD with your interface, allowing you to test and optimize different BOLD/ergonomic/BOLD solutions before the launch. With these tools, you can visualize the BOLD/structure/BOLD of your site in advance and anticipate development changes, while ensuring intuitive BOLD/navigation/BOLD and clear BOLD/information hierarchy/BOLD.

Every detail is carefully crafted to enhance the BOLD/user experience/BOLD, combining BOLD/simplicity/BOLD, BOLD/aesthetics/BOLD, and BOLD/performance/BOLD, while providing you with the flexibility needed to adjust the design based on feedback and specific needs.

LIST.TITLE: User Testing
LIST.CONTENT:
To ensure that your site truly meets the real needs of your users, we organize BOLD/user tests/BOLD in a structured and tailored approach. We involve users who are representative of your BOLD/target audience/BOLD, based on specific profiles, in test sessions where they interact with your site.

These sessions allow us to gather their feedback, evaluate the BOLD/performance/BOLD of the site, and analyze their experience to identify strengths and areas for improvement.

By collecting their insights, we can detect potential BOLD/roadblocks/BOLD, navigation issues, or unintuitive features. Based on this information, we propose targeted adjustments to optimize the BOLD/user experience/BOLD and enhance the fluidity and efficiency of your site to better meet your audience’s expectations. These tests are crucial to ensure the relevance of your project before its large-scale launch.

INTRO.QUESTION: Give new life to your business with a captivating showcase site or a high-performing online store.
INTRO.RESPONSE:
BOLD/Custom design:/BOLD a website that reflects your brand with a modern, professional style (brand guidelines created if necessary)
BOLD/Optimized content:/BOLD clear pages to present your business, products, and facilitate contact.
BOLD/Accessibility:/BOLD a smooth user experience, adapted to all devices (mobile, tablet, desktop).
BOLD/SEO (Search Engine Optimization):/BOLD to help your clients find you easily.
BOLD/Maintenance:/BOLD so you don’t have to worry about anything.

Whether you're an artisan, freelancer, or small business, our team designs high-performing showcase and e-commerce websites tailored to your needs, ready to boost your visibility and sales.

LIST.TITLE: Showcase Sites
LIST.CONTENT:
A showcase site is an online platform designed to present your business, products, services, or values. Unlike an e-commerce site, it doesn't allow direct online sales but plays a key role in your digital strategy: informing, reassuring, and attracting visitors.

It’s your digital business card, accessible 24/7, allowing your customers and prospects to: 
BOLD/Discover who you are:/BOLD a striking homepage presenting your activity and values.
BOLD/Explore your services or products:/BOLD detailed pages explaining what you offer.
BOLD/Get in touch with you:/BOLD a contact form, an interactive map, or your contact details.
BOLD/Access useful information:/BOLD hours, testimonials, portfolio, news, etc.

LIST.TITLE: E-commerce Site
LIST.CONTENT:
An e-commerce site is a digital platform that allows you to sell products or services directly online. Accessible anytime, anywhere, it offers a convenient alternative to physical stores while expanding the reach of businesses to a broader audience.

It typically includes several essential elements:
BOLD/A digital storefront:/BOLD Displays your products or services with detailed descriptions, images, and key information such as prices or available options.
BOLD/A shopping cart:/BOLD Allows customers to select and organize their purchases before finalizing their order.
BOLD/A secure payment system:/BOLD Integrates solutions such as credit cards, PayPal, or other online payment methods.
BOLD/Additional features:/BOLD Such as order tracking, customer reviews, promotions, or personalized shopping experiences.
BOLD/Admin access:/BOLD Allows you to manage products, orders, etc. (training on the tool is also available).

INTRO.QUESTION: Transform your idea into a powerful and intuitive application!
INTRO.RESPONSE:
BOLD/Complete customization:/BOLD Tailored to your goals and the specific needs of your users.
BOLD/Modern technologies:/BOLD To ensure high-performing, secure, and scalable applications.
BOLD/User experience:/BOLD Smooth, intuitive, and enjoyable, no matter the type of application.
BOLD/Tailored support:/BOLD From the beginning to the end of your project, our team supports you.
BOLD/Security and compliance:/BOLD To protect your data and comply with current regulations (GDPR).
BOLD/Maintenance:/BOLD To keep your application up-to-date with technological advancements and prevent usability bugs.

LIST.TITLE: Web SaaS (Software as a Service)
LIST.CONTENT:
A BOLD/SaaS/BOLD (Software as a Service) application is a software solution that is accessible online, without the need to download or install anything on the user's device. It allows your users to benefit from a scalable, flexible solution that is continuously updated, accessing all features directly via the internet. This model eliminates infrastructure constraints, providing a smooth and scalable experience.

Our BOLD/SaaS/BOLD solutions are designed to meet your specific needs while ensuring enhanced BOLD/security/BOLD and optimal BOLD/performance/BOLD, guaranteeing ease of management and rapid adoption by your users.

LIST.TITLE: Mobile
LIST.CONTENT:
We specialize in the development of BOLD/custom mobile applications/BOLD tailored to your business's unique needs. Whether you're launching a BOLD/service/BOLD, an online BOLD/store/BOLD, or a platform, our apps are optimized for mobile ergonomics and performance, offering a smooth and intuitive interaction with your users.

Designed to be robust, fast, and user-friendly, our apps ensure user satisfaction, whether for commercial or informational purposes. Each app is crafted to maximize the BOLD/user experience/BOLD while considering the constraints of different mobile operating systems.

LIST.TITLE: Desktop (Software)
LIST.CONTENT:
We design robust desktop applications tailored to specific professional needs. Whether for internal use or for BOLD/end customers/BOLD, our software is built to provide a simple interface and reliable BOLD/performance/BOLD, ensuring optimal productivity.

They seamlessly integrate into your work environment, with customized features to meet complex or specialized tasks. Our desktop applications are designed to be scalable and easy to maintain while ensuring maximum security and quick user adoption.

LIST.TITLE: Cross-Platform
LIST.CONTENT:
We develop BOLD/multi-platform/BOLD applications that work across multiple devices (web, mobile, desktop) from a single codebase. This consistent development approach saves time and resources while ensuring a uniform experience across all platforms.

Our BOLD/multi-platform/BOLD solutions are designed to be performant and adapted to the specificities of each environment while offering a consistent user interface. They maximize BOLD/efficiency/BOLD and reduce development costs, while ensuring simplified maintenance through code centralization.

OFFERS.SLOGAN: Creations that live up to your ideas

STEP_LIST.TITLE: Project Definition
STEP_LIST.DESCRIPTION:
The first step is to fully understand your needs and lay the foundations of the project. During this phase, we collaborate with you to define the goals, features, technical constraints, target audience, and other essential aspects for the project's success. 
We create a summary document that captures all key information and client expectations. This document serves as a reference throughout the project to ensure clear direction and avoid ambiguity.

STEP_LIST.TITLE: Analysis and Planning
STEP_LIST.DESCRIPTION:
Once the project is well-defined, we move on to the analysis and in-depth planning stage. At this point, we create a specifications document. This detailed document covers all technical aspects of the project, including specific features, time and budget constraints, technological choices, development and integration strategies, and validation processes.
This phase ensures that everyone, from the client to the developers, has a clear understanding of what needs to be done and under what conditions. It serves as a guide throughout the development phase.

STEP_LIST.TITLE: Functional Mockups
STEP_LIST.DESCRIPTION:
During this phase, we develop functional mockups (and optionally interactive prototypes) to illustrate the structure of the application or website. These mockups show the user interface in a simplified manner, without the final design, in order to focus solely on ergonomics and user flow.
This allows the client to validate the navigation, element layout, and flow logic of the application or website. Adjustments can be made at this stage to ensure the project aligns with the client's expectations.
STEP_LIST.DELIVERABLE: Validated interactive functional mockups (prototypes) by the client.

STEP_LIST.TITLE: Visual Mockups
STEP_LIST.DESCRIPTION:
Once the functional mockups are validated, we proceed to create visual mockups. At this stage, we apply the graphic design to the prototype to give a clear idea of what the final appearance of the site or application will look like. We use elements of the visual identity (logo, colors, typography) to propose a consistent, attractive design adapted to the user experience.
This phase allows for a visual validation of the product's aesthetics before moving on to the development phase. The client can suggest modifications or adjustments at this stage to ensure the design matches their vision.
STEP_LIST.DELIVERABLE: Validated visual mockups by the client.

STEP_LIST.TITLE: Development and Testing
STEP_LIST.DESCRIPTION:
This is the phase where the validated mockups come to life. Developers work on the code for the application or website, following the specifications defined in the specifications document and the mockups. Development is carried out in iterative steps, with regular internal testing to ensure everything functions as expected. 
At the same time, we conduct quality assurance testing to check functionality, performance, security, and the user experience.
STEP_LIST.DELIVERABLE: Beta version of the site or application, also validated by the client.

STEP_LIST.TITLE: Launch
STEP_LIST.DESCRIPTION:
Once all features have been validated and the product is ready, we proceed to launch. This phase involves deploying to the production environment, making the application or website accessible to end users. We also ensure that all technical configurations (hosting, domain name, security) are properly set up to ensure optimal product availability.
This phase also includes the full delivery of the source code to the client.
STEP_LIST.DELIVERABLE: Site or application live, source code delivery.

STEP_LIST.TITLE: Maintenance
STEP_LIST.DESCRIPTION:
After launch, it may be necessary to maintain the application or site to ensure its stability and evolution over time. We offer optional maintenance services, which include:
 - Regular updates to ensure security and compatibility with the latest technologies.
 - Bug fixes and continuous improvements based on user feedback.
 - Addition of additional features as your needs evolve.
This maintenance ensures that your site or application remains functional, secure, and up-to-date.

horseSafe.NAME: HorseSafe
horseSafe.SUBTITLE: Horse Surveillance
horseSafe.CONTEXT:
This BOLD/project/BOLD was developed in response to a BOLD/disturbing wave of horse mutilations/BOLD, which led owners to organize BOLD/surveillance rounds/BOLD to protect their animals. In order to BOLD/simplify and optimize this vigilance/BOLD, we designed a dedicated application that allows easy recording of the BOLD/rounds performed/BOLD and viewing on a map the BOLD/reports of mutilation acts or suspicious behaviors/BOLD.
To ensure BOLD/data privacy and security/BOLD, a BOLD/robust protection system/BOLD has been implemented.

animarah.NAME: Animarah
animarah.SUBTITLE: Animal Communication
animarah.CONTEXT:
The idea was to create a BOLD/showcase site/BOLD for an BOLD/animal communication/BOLD service, aiming to promote consultation services to better understand the BOLD/needs and emotions of animals/BOLD. The goal was to design a BOLD/clear and calming platform/BOLD, reflecting the compassionate and respectful philosophy of animal communication.
This project allowed me to develop an BOLD/intuitive design/BOLD, fostering trust and tranquility, while integrating features enabling visitors to BOLD/easily contact/BOLD and discover the BOLD/services offered/BOLD.

FEATURES.interface: BOLD/Interface design/BOLD allows you to design and customize the BOLD/visual appearance/BOLD of the application or site, structuring BOLD/the layout of elements/BOLD, choosing BOLD/colors, typography, and interactions/BOLD.
FEATURES.contact: BOLD/The contact form/BOLD allows users to BOLD/easily send messages/BOLD through the application or site, with an BOLD/automated email sending system/BOLD.
FEATURES.seo: BOLD/SEO (Search Engine Optimization)/BOLD involves BOLD/optimizing the application or site/BOLD to improve BOLD/visibility on search engines/BOLD, to attract more visitors BOLD/organically/BOLD.
